title: stipa pennata subsp. pennata
intro: Stipa pennata subsp. pennata, also known as Pennate Fescue or Blue Fescue, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Western Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Stipa pennata subsp. pennata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
